'''βàöf-l-th-h''' ('''kafalthehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cdi|cdi]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cdi|cdi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöf-l-th-h
|-
! Lemma
| kafalthehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalthehoko|thifalthehoko]] || [[word:jifalthehoko|jifalthehoko]] || [[word:shifalthehoko|shifalthehoko]] || [[word:kifalthehoko|kifalthehoko]]
|-
